patch.value: CONTEXT: Commander flags, MCP tool schemas, and pm contracts output all need overlapping schema data. DECISION: cli-contracts.ts (and cli-contracts/*) is the single truth; *_FLAG_CONTRACTS drive Commander, PM_TOOL_ACTION_SCHEMA_CONTRACTS drive both the lazy MCP schema Proxy and pm contracts; startup cost deferred via lazy Proxy. CONSEQUENCES: no CLI/MCP drift, always-accurate contracts; a single large file; new flags need coordinated edits across flag contracts + schema contracts + parameter tables (checklist in memory). EVIDENCE: src/sdk/cli-contracts.ts createLazyContractSchema; items pm-3mal/pm-p8j6/pm-xlzl.
ADR: Single-source contracts: cli-contracts.ts is the authoritative CLI+MCP+contracts surface
Single-source contracts: cli-contracts.ts is the authoritative CLI+MCP+contracts surface
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
Accepted ADR recorded in living map
The ADR captures a durable architecture or operating decision with context, consequences, and evidence for future agents.
The closed Decision 'ADR: Single-source contracts: cli-contracts.ts is the authoritative CLI+MCP+contracts surface' is recorded under the ADR living log and preserved as durable project context.
